channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Migrants languish in US detention centers facing dire conditions and prolonged waits
item.description: Prolonged detention has become more common in President Donald Trump’s second term, at least partly because a new policy generally prohibits immigration judges from releasing detainees while their deportation cases wind through backlogged courts.

item.title: Investigation continues a week after Savannah Guthrie mother was reported missing
Trial against Meta in New Mexico focuses on dangers of child sexual exploitation on social media
